user.title: Polymarket
user.description: Track the top markets in a Polymarket category, and optionally a wallet's portfolio. All data is read-only and public; no login is required.

data_description.category: A Polymarket category slug such as politics, sports or crypto.
data_description.top_n: How many top markets (by 24h volume) to create entities for.
data_description.wallet_address: Optional public wallet address to also track its portfolio and open positions.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Polymarket or the category was not found.
error.invalid_wallet: Wallet address must look like 0x followed by 40 hex characters.

abort.already_configured: This category and wallet combination is already configured.

data_description.top_n: How many top markets (by 24h volume) to track.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to refresh data from Polymarket (5–360 minutes).
